Django Unchained
programme.desc: When Django, a slave, is freed, he joins forces with a bounty hunter to rescue his wife, who has been enslaved by Calvin, a hard-hearted plantation owner.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: After spending eight months in a mental institution, a man tries to start a new life.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich lands a job as a legal assistant at Ed Masry's law firm. Here, she builds a case against a power company after she learns that they have been polluting a town's water supply.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: A pregnant assassin, code-named The Bride, goes into a coma for four years after her ex-boss Bill brutally attacks her. When she wakes up, she sets out to get revenge against him and his associates.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: After waking up with amnesia in a hospital, Robert Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks, one of his doctors, to protect the world from the evil plan of a scientist.

programme.title: Poseidon
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, the luxury ocean liner Poseidon capsizes after being swamped by a rogue wave. Later, the survivors are left to fight for their lives as they attempt to escape the sinking ship.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A dying curator of the Louvre hides cryptic clues on Da Vinci paintings. Now it is up to Robert Langdon and Sophie Neveu to follow the clues and unearth a secret kept hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: After witnessing the horrifying murder of his father, a young man sets out to seek retribution and attempts to bring down a crime lord.

programme.title: First Thing We Do, Let's Kill All The Lawyers
programme.desc: Will and the staff are questioned by their lawyer about an ACN story that’s become a network crisis.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad (Tim Robinson) struggles to keep his job and marriage afloat while relentlessly pursuing a friendship with his charming new neighbor, Brian (Paul Rudd).

programme.title: Everyday People
programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: Wifelike
programme.desc: Designed to behave like the late wife of a detective, an artificial human questions her reality as memories of a past life begin to resurface.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: When a young African-American man visits his white girlfriend’s family estate, he becomes ensnared in the more sinister, real reason for the invitation.

programme.title: No Reservations
programme.desc: Catherine Zeta Jones stars as a chef with a fiery temper struggling to care for her orphan niece and manage the handsome new sous chef.

programme.title: Ángel Rodríguez
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Angel Rodriguez tells the tale of Nicole, a social worker, and her relationship with Angel, a bright but troubled inner-city teen.

programme.title: Women Of Troy
programme.desc: Women of Troy is an HBO documentary exploring the career of the Cheryl Miller-led USC Trojans and their impact on women’s basketball.

programme.title: Up In The Air
programme.desc: George Clooney is Ryan Bingham, a corporate downsizing expert whose cherished life on the road is threatened.

programme.title: Episode 7
programme.desc: A darkly comedic limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise, that leads to one of them ending up dead.

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: Euphoria follows a group of high school students as they navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

programme.title: Episode 6

programme.title: Episode 4
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.desc: A small-town girl with big dreams must face the biggest challenge of her life - to stay true to her dream and her new romance.

programme.title: The Second Civil War
programme.desc: A HBO Original Movie about how a simple immigration issue spins wildly out of control for those involved, ranging from the US President to a news producer.

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: A juror in a high-profile murder trial faces a serious moral dilemma… one that could sway the jury to convict or free the accused killer.

programme.title: Living With Lincoln
programme.desc: This documentary examines how a one-of-a-kind collection of Abraham Lincoln photos and memorabilia have shaped the lives and sensibilities of five generations of his family.

programme.desc: The Brutalist' tracks the journey of László Toth, a Hungarian Jewish architect who, after surviving the Holocaust.

programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 418
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 57
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: MENCINTAI IPAR SENDIRI EPS 79
programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella takes Ayuna to a workshop to give her a surprise: Ayuna's sports car has been upgraded as a gift, since Bella is getting married before her older sister. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a hea

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 24
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: 99 NAMA CINTA 6
programme.desc: Talia lives under the spotlight of cameras and the heat of celebrity news. Since her fiancé passed away, she has kept her heart tightly closed. To her, love only brings loss.Meanwhile, Kiblat is a respected young ustad—calm, courteous, and firm in his principles. His life is well-directed—until an incident brings him face-to-face with Talia in a heated argument over a minor accident. They instantl

programme.title: RAHASIA DAN CINTA 28
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent business tycoon, is arranged to marry Greg. The two are brought together because their fathers want to merge their companies. Dwita's father knows that she will most likely reject this plan. Therefore, he provides her with a new facility—a bodyguard named Debu. Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.

programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party; the kids worry that Leni is too weak and they try to teach her how to be more aggressive.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln spills one of Lisa's experiments, setting off a chain reaction throughout the house; Lincoln tries to encourage the family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photograph gets more "likes" on social media than Lori's, she tries to one-up her; thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on Lola's home-schooling.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde is desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, so he enlists Leni's help; worried that their parents are hurting their health from not being active, the children encourage them to exercise.

How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: An advice columnist attempts to make a man dump her in 10 days, but he makes a bet with his boss that he will make her fall in love with him.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: With the intention of getting a breast implant, Elizabeth becomes a high school substitute teacher. However, when she learns about a bountiful bonus, she strives to get her students the highest marks.

programme.title: New Year's Eve
programme.desc: As the New Year approaches, the eve results in a distinct variety of couples and single people's journeys and stories intertwining.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: A spirited rivalry grows when Peter pushes boundaries with Thomas McGregor, creating chaos around Bea as she offers calm reassurance amid playful tension and shifting intentions.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: Realising that Sam has still not come to terms with his wife Maggie's death, his eight-year-old son Jonah forces him to call a national radio talk show, with the hopes of finding him a companion.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: A successful plastic surgeon attempts to win over a young match teacher by convincing his secretary to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife.

programme.title: What's Love Got to Do with It?
programme.desc: Filmmaker Zoe Stevenson documents her Pakistani best friend's journey to an arranged marriage. Over time, the process begins to make her challenge her own attitudes towards relationships.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: A professor's world turns upside down when she discovers that her longtime boyfriend belongs to an eccentric, super rich family of business moguls.

programme.title: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: When grieving architect David moves into a new apartment, he finds the spirit of the last tenant, workaholic doctor Elizabeth, still very much in-residence.

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.desc: Hacker enlists the help of CyberSquad to get back home.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.desc: Alma and her friends judge a Best Bronx food truck contest; Alma and Junior are excited to play restaurant in their backyard, until Howard opens a competing restaurant.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla overcomes her fear of rock-climbing; a riddle game about everyday objects made by Black inventors.
